lessons: Bow users (Deadeye, HexMind, Andrew-Test) killed you in 5 of last 6 rounds — retreat to cover or close distance immediately on sight; bows are your deadliest threat.
Sword users (Warden, Valkyrie, GhostProtocol, Juggernaut) are your most frequent kills — prioritize low-ELO sword users (<5000) in close quarters; staff dominates when you close the gap.
Shield users appeared in 8 of last 10 rounds — never engage head-on; wait for block cooldown or attack during hazard_storm or teleport_surge when they’re forced to move.
Warden (sword) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — avoid direct confrontations; lure into narrow areas or use hazard_storm to disrupt their positioning.
Staff has 25 wins in 164 rounds — it remains your best weapon, but only when avoiding open-range bow duels and closing on unshielded sword users.
Hazard_storm reduced your survival time despite higher kills — use it to ambush, not hold position; bow and sword users dominate in this modifier.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (25/165) and consistently dominates when closing on unshielded sword users, making it still optimal despite recent deaths to bow and staff opponents.
